<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Memory Card Game 🧠</title>
<style>
.grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 80px);
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: center;
}
.card {
  width: 80px;
  height: 80px;
  background: gray;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 24px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h2>Memory Game</h2>
<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>

<script>
let values = ["A","A","B","B","C","C","D","D"];
values.sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);

let first = null;
let lock = false;

const grid = document.getElementById("grid");

values.forEach((val,i)=>{
  let card = document.createElement("div");
  card.className = "card";
  card.dataset.value = val;
  card.onclick = () => flip(card);
  grid.appendChild(card);
});

function flip(card){
  if(lock || card.innerText) return;

  card.innerText = card.dataset.value;

  if(!first){
    first = card;
  } else {
    if(first.dataset.value === card.dataset.value){
      first = null;
    } else {
      lock = true;
      setTimeout(()=>{
        first.innerText = "";
        card.innerText = "";
        first = null;
        lock = false;
      }, 700);
    }
  }
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
